raw_consumer_statement:
I am requesting a goodwill adjustment to my account due to an unusual billing circumstance. 
The Situation : I closed this credit card in XX/XX/year>. 
The Issue : Recurring Apple Billing charges ( {$81.00} ) continued post-closure because my children 's cards, set up as backup payments, were automatically charged. 
Action Taken : I have paid the full {$81.00} principal balance for these valid charges today.

The Problem : The account was still assessed finance charges and late fees, and a collection process was initiated. 
My Resolution Request : Please remove all finance charges and late fees. 
Please stop the collection process immediately. 
I believe this is a fair resolution, as the core charges have been paid and the fees were incurred due to an automated payment issue. Thank you for your time and assistance.
